verification.allow_failed_review_command: python -m maskfactory.cli governance verify-currency-review qa/governance/currency/current_review.json --public-key configs/governance/currency_review_ed25519_public.pem --pipeline configs/pipeline.yaml --external-registry configs/external_sources.yaml --model-registry models/model_registry.json --rollback-evidence qa/governance/currency/rollback_evidence.json --required-event scheduled_90_day --allow-failed-review
verification.strict_review_command: python -m maskfactory.cli governance verify-currency-review qa/governance/currency/current_review.json --public-key configs/governance/currency_review_ed25519_public.pem --pipeline configs/pipeline.yaml --external-registry configs/external_sources.yaml --model-registry models/model_registry.json --rollback-evidence qa/governance/currency/rollback_evidence.json --required-event scheduled_90_day

authority_boundary: Cryptographic signature, review chain, event, current active-input hashes, and rollback evidence integrity verify. Policy status intentionally remains fail until required live role benchmark certificates and distinct tested rollback evidence exist. This record grants no runtime certificate, promotion, or release authority.
